arts.ttl: Amad and Alejandro Garnacho Man United transfer price speaks volumes for Ruben Amorim exit plan
arts.sum: Manchester United transfer news as Amad confirms his status as the main attacker for Ruben Amorim with Alejandro Garnacho's future uncertain

arts.ttl: Luke Littler to parade Ally Pally trophy at Old Trafford as Man Utd mourn Denis Law
arts.sum: Manchester United will welcome PDC World Champion Luke Littler to Old Trafford for their Premier League game against Brighton on Sunday - a match that will also contain tributes for Denis Law

arts.ttl: Ipswich win should give Brighton belief - Hurzeler
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion head coach Fabian Hurzeler believes his side 'deserved' all three points after securing their first win in eight matches against Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'suffer major blow' in pursuit of 'top target'
arts.sum: Manchester United-linked Nuno Mendes is reportedly set to sign a new contract with Paris Saint-Germain, with the French club's head coach Luis Enrique convincing him to stay.

arts.ttl: ‘Internal discussions’: Man Utd have spoken about signing £10m player from Wolves – journalist
arts.sum: Manchester United have some serious problems at left-back right now. Noussair Mazraoui is currently playing that role, but he’s not a natural left-back. Luckily for...

arts.ttl: Gary Neville pays touching tribute to Manchester United great Denis Law
arts.sum: Gary Neville has paid tribute to Denis Law after the Man Utd and Scotland icon passed away, aged 84.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville pays emotional tribute to Denis Law as Man United legend hails 'incredible' fellow great - while CEO Omar Berrada is spotted laying flowers at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Gary Neville (inset) hailed Denis Law (left) as 'an incredible player' and someone who will be missed an 'awful lot' after the Manchester United legend passed way at the age of 84 on Friday.

arts.ttl: Manchester United target left wing-back and striker to bolster Ruben Amorim’s squad
arts.sum: United are looking to strengthen their squad with a raid on Wolves

arts.ttl: Manchester United handed new Joshua Zirkzee suspension verdict after Southampton controversy
arts.sum: Manchester United news as PGMOL's former chief believes Joshua Zirkzee has wrongly escaped punishment

arts.ttl: Man United handed boost as Napoli make Alejandro Garnacho transfer decision?
arts.sum: Napoli have reportedly decided to shift their focus elsewhere after a failed bid of £40m for Manchester United attacker Alejandro Garnacho.
